auth.registerSubHeading: Create your account to get started
auth.registerSuccessMessage: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.loginSubHeading: Please enter your details to Sign in
auth.forgotPasswordSubheading: We'll help you regain access to your account. Please enter your email address to receive a password reset link.
auth.resetMessage: For security, please enter a strong password and confirm it below.
auth.resetExpireMessage: The reset password link has expired. Please request a fresh one to reset your password

reset.message: A password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) to proceed.

verify.message: Please check your email to complete the verification process.

general.emailLinkMessage: If the email address exists in our systems, you will receive a relevant link in your email.

unverifedLogin.message: check your email to reset your password

unverifiedVerfication.message: Link has been expired. Please click below to send new verification email

unVerifiedEmail.message: Something went wrong with link. Please try to login and generate a new link

successfulAccountVerified.message: Your account is verified, click below to go to the login page.

unSuccessfulAccountVerified.message: Couldn't verify, please click the below button to get a new link.
